name: Codacy Open Source Program
description: Free Team plan forever for open source projects, with full cloud platform access including PR integration, quality gates, and security scanning across 49 supported languages.

perks.title: Free Team Plan
perks.description: Full cloud platform access at no cost for open source projects, including team dashboards, quality gates, and PR integration.

perks.title: Security Scanning
perks.description: SAST, secrets detection, and dependency vulnerability scanning across all 49 supported languages.

perks.title: Code Coverage Tracking
perks.description: Track test coverage metrics with inline reporting and coverage gates on pull requests.

eligibility: Must be an open source project with a public repository.
applicationProcess: Sign up at codacy.com with your GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket account.
Open source repositories are automatically eligible for the free Team plan.
